title: Maintain roof gardens, vertical gardens and green facades
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain roof gardens, vertical gardens and green facades demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
